name: security-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for security/compliance work — currently the Sec Policy Analyzer (Node) for parsing policy .docx into structured v2 JSON.

plugins.name: sec-policy-analyzer-node
plugins.description: Parse security/compliance policy .docx (NIST, ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI DSS, …) into the v2 structured JSON schema with full-ancestor IDs, framework-aware policy-id, scopes/assets/linkage fields, an assignment-selectors index, and optional flat CSV. v0.3 adds an opt-in v3 schema variant (compact reference-ids + condition framework-tags) and a policy-to-controls mapping skill that crosswalks parsed statements to a controls catalog (NIST xlsx) and emits top-pick mappings with related procedure IDs. Node + adm-zip + fast-xml-parser; no Python required.
